cad_specification:
from cadquery import Workplane

# Create a decorative cross/plus sign shape with rounded corners and edges
# Base dimensions approximately 80mm x 80mm x 15mm thick

# Create the main cross shape
result = (Workplane("XY")
    # Create horizontal bar of the cross
    .box(80, 25, 15)
    # Add vertical bar of the cross
    .union(Workplane("XY").box(25, 80, 15))
    # Fillet all vertical edges for rounded corners
    .edges("|Z")
    .fillet(8)
    # Fillet top and bottom edges for smooth profile
...
